title: ADT Adapter Output Schema
description: Output contract for the Runtime Adapter. Wraps the Governance Plan (via $ref — no duplicate definition) with adapter-level error state. The route field mirrors governance_plan.route for convenience but is NOT authoritative.

governance_plan.description: The Governance Plan produced by the Dynamic Governance Router. $ref to the single normative GovernancePlan schema — no duplicate definition.

adapter_error.description: Adapter-level error. Distinct from governance_plan.route — the router's route determination is NEVER overwritten. null when no adapter error.

route.description: Mirrors governance_plan.route for convenience. NOT the authoritative source — see governance_plan.route.
